prompt: Tap flop_left to lock the first board cue.
why_v1: Board anchors keep your plan consistent across streets.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_left is the first board anchor, so the line starts from the first public cue before later streets change the pressure story.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the left flop card: that first board cue sets the tournament pressure read before later streets tell you whether to keep pressing or slow down.
